test.create_query: CREATE TABLE map_100_keys (id UInt64, m Map(String, UInt64)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
CREATE TABLE map_1000_keys (id UInt64, m Map(String, UInt64)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
CREATE TABLE map_10000_keys (id UInt64, m Map(String, UInt64)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO map_100_keys SELECT number AS id, mapFromArrays(arrayMap(i -> 'key' || toString(i), range(100)), arrayMap(i -> number + i, range(100))) AS m FROM numbers(1000000)
OPTIMIZE TABLE map_100_keys FINAL SETTINGS mutations_sync=1
INSERT INTO map_1000_keys SELECT number AS id, mapFromArrays(arrayMap(i -> 'key' || toString(i), range(1000)), arrayMap(i -> number + i, range(1000))) AS m FROM numbers(100000)
OPTIMIZE TABLE map_1000_keys FINAL SETTINGS mutations_sync=1
INSERT INTO map_10000_keys SELECT number AS id, mapFromArrays(arrayMap(i -> 'key' || toString(i), range(10000)), arrayMap(i -> number + i, range(10000))) AS m FROM numbers(1000)
OPTIMIZE TABLE map_10000_keys FINAL SETTINGS mutations_sync=1
test.query: SELECT m['key0'] FROM map_100_keys FORMAT Null
SELECT m['key0'] FROM map_1000_keys FORMAT Null
SELECT m['key0'] FROM map_10000_keys FORMAT Null
SELECT m['key0'], m['key1'], m['key2'] FROM map_100_keys FORMAT Null
SELECT m['key0'], m['key1'], m['key2'] FROM map_1000_keys FORMAT Null
SELECT m['key0'], m['key1'], m['key2'] FROM map_10000_keys FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM map_100_keys WHERE m['key1'] = 1 FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM map_1000_keys WHERE m['key1'] = 1 FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM map_10000_keys WHERE m['key1'] = 1 FORMAT Null
